{{CargoRelic
|name=Frankenstein
|class_id=22703
|rank=S
|affct=CIV
|birthday=03-03
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (1.62%)
|description=On Mar 3, 1818 AD, British author Shelley completed the creation of Frankenstein.<br>The protagonist of the novel Frankenstein is a biologist who is passionate about the origin of life. He tries to conquer death and create a new life by wandering around the corpses and trying to piece together a huge human body using different parts of the corpses. When he successfully creates a monster, he does not feel happy, but rather a series of strange and mysterious murders. From Frankenstein, we can see people's attitudes towards the rapid development of science and technology at that time. On the one hand, people are delighted with great progress, and on the other hand, they are plunged into panic and reflection. Therefore, Frankenstein is also considered the world's first science fiction novel.
|fame=69
|art=57
|fth=59
|civ=99
|tech=48
|ss1=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +1<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Snail RUSH +2<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +16<br>Prairie Protomon: 60/60
|ss2=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +2<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Snail RUSH +4<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +32<br>Prairie Protomon: 60/60
|ss3=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +3<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Snail RUSH +6<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +48<br>Prairie Protomon: 60/60
|ss4=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +5<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Snail RUSH +10<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +80<br>Prairie Protomon: 60/60
|ss5=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +7<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Snail RUSH +14<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +112<br>Prairie Protomon: 60/60
|ss6=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +10<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Snail RUSH +20<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +160<br>Prairie Protomon: 60/60
|ss7=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +10<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Snail RUSH +20<br>Per 3 Prairie Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +160<br>Prairie Protomon: 60/60<br>Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +10 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Lifesteal Effect +30%
|skill2=[[File:Frostsanctum skill III.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: This Relic's CIV +15
|skill3=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, 2x Blue Reagent Drops +15%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Frankenstein|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Glue, +100|orange}}
|3name=Frankenstein|3rec=100.10M|3atk=292356|3defense=184723|3hp=14935467|3weak=34623
|4name=Android|4rec=134.08M|4atk=371609|4defense=232541|4hp=21557400|4weak=37793
|Arec=189.53M|Aatk=504516|Adefense=310549|Ahp=36029433|Aweak=42362
}}}}
